channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump Hits a Wall on Voter Fraud Claims
item.description: President Trump's voter fraud crusade is hitting the limits of his power ahead of November's midterm elections. Why it matters: Trump has made combating voter fraud a central issue.

item.title: The Hidden Price of Unquestioning Allegiance
item.description: President Trump trained elected Republicans to obey him, even when they disagreed. Elected Republicans trained Trump to expect obedience, even as his ...

item.title: Record Heat Wave Sweeps Across Europe
item.description: New June temperature records were set in the U.K. and France this week as a deadly heat wave grips much of Europe. Why it matters: A new World Weather...

item.title: Apple and Microsoft Raise Prices Amid AI Boom
item.description: People spend a lot of time on their devices. The AI boom means they will also be spending more for them. Why it matters: The enormous sums of money go...
